hooks.command: python -c "import sys, platform; print(f'[SYSTEM CONTEXT] OS: {sys.platform} | Platform: {platform.system()} {platform.release()} | Shell note: use PowerShell-compatible commands on win32, bash on linux')"

MESSAGE=$(cat | jq -r '.message // empty'); echo "$MESSAGE" | grep -qiE 'archilume.ui|archilume_ui|reflex|rx\.|component|state|styling|frontend|ui' && echo 'REFLEX DOCS REMINDER: This prompt may involve Reflex UI work. Before planning or implementing, search .claude/skills/reflex-docs/reference/ for relevant patterns. Read llms.txt for the overview, then grep components/core dirs for specifics. Use WebFetch on reflex.dev if local docs are insufficient. Do not invent workarounds when docs exist.' || true
FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]] && python -m py_compile "$FILE" 2>&1 || true

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" == *archilume_ui* ]] && cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/archilume/apps/archilume_ui && python -c "import archilume_ui.archilume_ui" 2>&1 || true
